documents.text: The Proposal Proposal "The Proposal Proposal" is the first episode of the eleventh season, and 232nd episode overall of the "The Big Bang Theory". It first aired on CBS on September 25, 2017. Amy enthusiastically accepts Sheldon's marriage proposal. However, when dining with Amy's colleagues later that night, Sheldon is offended that they are more impressed with Amy's work than his own. With help from Stephen Hawking, Sheldon later comes to grips with the fact that he will not always be the center of attention in the marriage. All three also serve as head writers. The show premiered on CBS on September 24, 2007.
